title: clusia havetioides
intro: Clusia havetioides is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae, commonly known as the 'Guttao' or 'Purging Nut'. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Clusia havetioides include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even have antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea and infusions, which can be made by boiling the leaves or roots in water, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
